kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Weaver goes with exactly two of Edmund, Southgate, and 18 coins.
Potter goes with none of Aldric, Riverside, or Southgate.

Between Beatrix and 8 coins, one goes with Mason and the other with Potter.
Exactly two of (the members of the North Side, Edmund, and Wulfric) belong to the Ironmongers' Guild.
The artisan in Oldwall's levy is between the Weaver and Wulfric.
Between Beatrix and Edmund, one goes with Weaver and the other with 16 coins.
The artisan in Eastcheap's levy is at least 4 coins more than Rowan.

Aldric's levy is lower than both the Fletcher and the artisan in Oldwall.
